languages.text: "Я понимаю, мое мнение может показаться вам странным, ведь то, что этот бедняга попал в Сектор Бионика уже можно считать благословением. Но выслушайте: установка благословенного кортикального аугмента поможет пациенту снова встать на ноги и подать пример остальным своим героизмом. Это вдохновит людей и укрепит их веру в господина. Пусть знают, что милосердие Вольного Торговца не оставит их в трудный час."

traits.locale_text: "Установка кортикального аугмента Зета-130 поможет пациенту снова встать на ноги и продолжить свою опасную службу, Лорд-капитан. Мы сможем вернуть его на службу, чтобы он и дальше совершал подвиги в вашу честь! Будьте же милосердны..."

languages.text: "I understand that my opinion may strike you as strange, for the mere fact that this poor soul has found his way to the Sector Bionica might itself be regarded as a blessing. Yet hear me out. The installation of a cortical augmentation will restore the patient to health, serving as an example for the rest of us through his heroism. This will inspire the people and strengthen their faith in the Lord Captain, and let them know that the Rogue Trader's mercy will not abandon them in their hour of need."
languages.original_text: "Я понимаю, мое мнение может показаться вам странным, ведь то, что этот бедняга попал в Сектор Бионика уже можно считать благословением. Но выслушайте: установка благословенного кортикального аугмента поможет пациенту снова встать на ноги и подать пример остальным своим героизмом. Это вдохновит людей и укрепит их веру в господина. Пусть знают, что милосердие Вольного Торговца не оставит их в трудный час."

Yet hear me out. The installation of a cortical augmentation will restore the patient to health, serving as an example for the rest of us through his heroism. This will inspire the people and strengthen their faith in the Lord Captain, and let them know that the Rogue Trader's mercy will not abandon them in their hour of need."

The installation of a Zeta-130 cortical augmentation will restore the patient to health, serving as an example for the rest of us through his heroism. This will inspire the people and strengthen their faith in the Lord Captain, and let them know that the Rogue Trader's mercy will not abandon them in their hour of need."

"Installation of a Zeta-130 cortical augmentation will restore the patient to health and allow him to continue his service, perhaps earning a promotion and serving as an example for the rest of us through his heroism..."

This will inspire the people and strengthen their faith in the Lord Captain, and let them know that the Rogue Trader's mercy will not abandon them in their hour of need."

languages.text: 「ゼータ130型の皮質増補器を装着すれば、患者は健康を回復して任務を継続でき、やがては昇進を得て、その英雄性によって我々の模範ともなり得るでしょう……」
languages.original_text: "Installation of a Zeta-130 cortical augmentation will restore the patient to health and allow him to continue his service, perhaps earning a promotion and serving as an example for the rest of us through his heroism..."

traits.locale_text: 「ゼータ130型の皮質増補器を装着すれば、患者は健康を回復して任務を継続でき、やがては昇進を得て、その英雄性によって我々の模範ともなり得るでしょう……」

languages.text: « Je comprends que mon opinion puisse vous paraître étrange, car le seul fait que ce pauvre bougre ait réussi à gagner le secteur Bionica peut être considéré comme une bénédiction en soi, mais je vous conjure de bien vouloir m'écouter. L'implantation d'une augmentation corticale permettra au patient de recouvrer la santé, ce qui fera de lui un modèle d'héroïsme pour l'ensemble de l'équipage. Son histoire inspirera vos sujets et consolidera leur foi en leur {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, en leur prouvant que {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} ne les abandonnera pas dans l'adversité. »
languages.original_text: "I understand that my opinion may strike you as strange, for the mere fact that this poor soul has found his way to the Sector Bionica might itself be regarded as a blessing. Yet hear me out. The installation of a cortical augmentation will restore the patient to health, serving as an example for the rest of us through his heroism. This will inspire the people and strengthen their faith in the Lord Captain, and let them know that the Rogue Trader's mercy will not abandon them in their hour of need."

traits.locale_text: « Je comprends que mon opinion puisse vous paraître étrange, car le seul fait que ce pauvre bougre ait réussi à gagner le secteur Bionica peut être considéré comme une bénédiction en soi, mais je vous conjure de bien vouloir m'écouter. L'implantation d'une augmentation corticale permettra au patient de recouvrer la santé, ce qui fera de lui un modèle d'héroïsme pour l'ensemble de l'équipage. Son histoire inspirera vos sujets et consolidera leur foi en leur {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, en leur prouvant que {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} ne les abandonnera pas dans l'adversité. »

languages.text: "Fikrim size tuhaf gelebilir, anlıyorum. Zira bu zavallı ruhun yolunu Sektör Biyonika'ya düşürmüş olması bile başlı başına bir lütuf sayılabilir. Ancak beni dinleyin. Bir zihinsel ogmentasyonun takılması, hastayı sağlığına kavuşturacak olup o da kahramanlığıyla kalanlara örnek teşkil edecektir. Bu; insanlara ilham verecek, Lord Kaptan'a olan inançlarını güçlendirecek ve Hür Tacir'in merhametinin onları ihtiyaç anlarında terk etmeyeceğini bilmelerini sağlayacaktır."
languages.original_text: "I understand that my opinion may strike you as strange, for the mere fact that this poor soul has found his way to the Sector Bionica might itself be regarded as a blessing. Yet hear me out. The installation of a cortical augmentation will restore the patient to health, serving as an example for the rest of us through his heroism. This will inspire the people and strengthen their faith in the Lord Captain, and let them know that the Rogue Trader's mercy will not abandon them in their hour of need."

traits.locale_text: "Fikrim size tuhaf gelebilir, anlıyorum. Zira bu zavallı ruhun yolunu Sektör Biyonika'ya düşürmüş olması bile başlı başına bir lütuf sayılabilir. Ancak beni dinleyin. Bir zihinsel ogmentasyonun takılması, hastayı sağlığına kavuşturacak olup o da kahramanlığıyla kalanlara örnek teşkil edecektir. Bu; insanlara ilham verecek, Lord Kaptan'a olan inançlarını güçlendirecek ve Hür Tacir'in merhametinin onları ihtiyaç anlarında terk etmeyeceğini bilmelerini sağlayacaktır."

languages.text: "Mir ist klar, dass Euch meine Meinung möglicherweise seltsam vorkommt, aber allein der Umstand, dass diese arme Seele ihren Weg in den Sector Bionica gefunden hat, könnte man schon als Segen betrachten. Aber hört mir zu. Die Installation der Kortikalaugmentation Zeta-130 stellt die Gesundheit des Patienten wieder her, damit uns sein Heldenmut allen als Vorbild dienen kann. Das wiederum wird die Leute beflügeln und ihren Glauben an den Lord Captain stärken, da sie erkennen werden, dass sie {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} in ihrer dunkelsten Stunde nicht im Stich lassen wird."
languages.original_text: "I understand that my opinion may strike you as strange, for the mere fact that this poor soul has found his way to the Sector Bionica might itself be regarded as a blessing. Yet hear me out. The installation of a cortical augmentation will restore the patient to health, serving as an example for the rest of us through his heroism. This will inspire the people and strengthen their faith in the Lord Captain, and let them know that the Rogue Trader's mercy will not abandon them in their hour of need."

Aber hört mir zu. Die Installation der Kortikalaugmentation Zeta-130 stellt die Gesundheit des Patienten wieder her, damit uns sein Heldenmut allen als Vorbild dienen kann. Das wiederum wird die Leute beflügeln und ihren Glauben an den Lord Captain stärken, da sie erkennen werden, dass sie {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} in ihrer dunkelsten Stunde nicht im Stich lassen wird."

languages.text: «Entiendo que mi opinión pueda parecerle extraña, pero el mero hecho de que este desdichado haya llegado al Sector Bionica podría ser una bendición en sí. Escúcheme. Instalar un aumento cortical devolverá al paciente su salud, haciendo que su heroísmo se convierta en un ejemplo a seguir y reforzando la fe en {mf|el|la} Lord Capitán y demostrando que {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente mostrará compasión cuando más la necesiten».
languages.original_text: "I understand that my opinion may strike you as strange, for the mere fact that this poor soul has found his way to the Sector Bionica might itself be regarded as a blessing. Yet hear me out. The installation of a cortical augmentation will restore the patient to health, serving as an example for the rest of us through his heroism. This will inspire the people and strengthen their faith in the Lord Captain, and let them know that the Rogue Trader's mercy will not abandon them in their hour of need."

traits.locale_text: «Entiendo que mi opinión pueda parecerle extraña, pero el mero hecho de que este desdichado haya llegado al Sector Bionica podría ser una bendición en sí. Escúcheme. Instalar un aumento cortical devolverá al paciente su salud, haciendo que su heroísmo se convierta en un ejemplo a seguir y reforzando la fe en {mf|el|la} Lord Capitán y demostrando que {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente mostrará compasión cuando más la necesiten».

languages.text: “我明白，您可能会觉得我的看法很奇怪，毕竟这个可怜人能活着来到仿生区，本身就算是一种恩赐了。但请您听我说完。只需安装一个皮层植入物，就能让病人恢复健康。而他的英勇事迹将成为我们所有人的榜样。这会激励人民，增强他们对舰长大人的信任，也会让他们知道，行商浪人宽厚仁慈，绝不会在他们最绝望的时候抛弃他们。”
languages.original_text: "I understand that my opinion may strike you as strange, for the mere fact that this poor soul has found his way to the Sector Bionica might itself be regarded as a blessing.
